backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining task management system with user profiles, task CRUD operations, verification/rating workflow, leaderboard, and integrated authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting QR code generation from UPI ID and usage of UPI_ID constant, linking implementation files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend React components, views, and hooks covering task management UI, authentication, profile management, and data fetching logic.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color tokens for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading Google Sign-In SDK, QRCode.js library, and mounting React app with PROXIIS title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view routing between landing, hub, and profile pages with neon grid background and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontal scrollable category filter with pill-style buttons supporting 8 task categories plus 'All' option with gradient selection states.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Modal dialog handling task completion photo upload by performers and verification/rating by creators with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Horizontal scrollable filter bar with three toggle buttons (Newest, Most Urgent, Highest Paying) for sorting task lists.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Top navigation bar component with centered PROXIIS branding, search functionality, notifications popover, leaderboard sheet, and profile navigation. Includes search toggle state and styled action buttons.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Displays top 10 users ranked by earnings with task completion count and average ratings. Shows loading skeletons and empty state with trophy icon.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating new tasks with fields for title, category, price, location, safe spot, telegram handle, deadline, and photo upload. Handles photo preview, upload progress, and task submission via actor.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Generates and displays a QR code for UPI payment using the QRCode library from CDN. Shows amount with 10% platform fee included.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Renders star rating visualization with support for full, half, and empty stars up to a configurable maximum.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Card component displaying task preview with photo, title, location, deadline, price, and category badge. Opens TaskDetailsSheet on click with authentication and profile checks.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: Side sheet showing full task details with actions for accepting, discussing via Telegram, completing, toggling chat, and deleting tasks. Includes QR code payment display and role-based action visibility.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: Auto-scrolling vertical reel displaying recent completed tasks with checkmark icons. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth infinite scroll animation.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Configuration file exporting the UPI_ID constant for payment processing, currently set to a placeholder value.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: React hook for Google OAuth authentication that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, handles sign-in/sign-out, decodes JWT tokens, and manages user state with error handling and timeout logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: React Query hook that fetches the leaderboard data (array of Profile objects) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching caller profiles, user profiles, creating profiles with Google, and saving user profiles with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: React Query mutation hooks for task actions including assigning performers, completing tasks with photos, verifying tasks with ratings, toggling Telegram discussions, and deleting tasks.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all tasks, searching tasks, getting user post history, and creating new tasks with photo uploads and deadlines.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for dark mode theming, including colors for primary, secondary, accent, and chart components with OKLCH color space values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for generating Telegram deep links and UPI payment links with 10% platform fee calculation for payment QR codes.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between datetime-local input strings and bigint nanosecond timestamps, plus formatting deadlines into human-readable date/time strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main hub view component that displays a filterable/searchable list of tasks with category selection, sorting options, and a modal for posting new tasks (requires authentication and user profile).
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Landing page component showcasing the PROXIIS platform with hero section, feature highlights, and a call-to-action button to navigate to the hub.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: User profile view that handles Internet Identity authentication, Google sign-in integration, profile creation/editing, and displays user stats, ratings, and post history.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural notes, known issues, existing features (UPI QR code generation), and pending feature requests for the PROXIIS application.
